Here we go! SAY HELLO TO MY LITTLE FRIEND!!!
*BAM BAM! RATATATATATATATAAA!!*
She got the hang of it pretty quick. And if she can do it, anyone can.
Ehehehe... Unstoppable ghost over here! But I am a teensy bit tired so how about we take five in that research lab-looking building over there?
Ah!? Look out, Long Island! There's something behind you!
Say what?
ROoooooOOOAAAaaar!!!
AAAIEEEEEEEeeeee! What is it this time!?
I figured it out. That's the "final boss" of this level, yeah?
Huh?! It's just a video game boss? Ahahahahaa!
And why would the last boss be here of all places?! We just got here!
This is gonna be tough. I'm thinking just wailing on it with basic attacks won't do the trick!
Hey! There's a ROCKET LAUNCHER over here!!
Urk! It's so heavy!!
We'll create a diversion. AI, do it! Pull the trigger!
Got it! Here I go! WITNESS MEEEEEEEE!!!
*KABOOOOOOOM*
Now we wait for the dust to clear to see if we won.
Woah, Ayanami! Don't jinx us here....
I see how it is! That "Rocket Launcher" is the strongest weapon in the ga- AUGH!?
Ikazuchi!? Wai- it's not dead yet. Look out!!
AAAAAAAAAaaaaaaaa! It's a FLAAAAAAAAAAAAAG!!!
GAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHHHH!!!
Holy~ This is some hax over here!
Ok- okay.... everyone's... everyone's gone....
Umm... sorry, everybody. That one's on me.
Continue?
SO IS THIS A GAME OR NOT!?

sequence: "Virtual Connection Synchronicity" - Daily Memorabilia  Chapter 3 - Helloooo! San Diego Here♪!

And today is my debut as a virtual idol!!!
...like this, right?
Yeah! That's just like a VTuber! I've had my eyes on you from the beginning and I've got 20/20 vision!
But, like, I was really surprised when you said you wanted to become a VTuber, San Diego.
Me too! All of a sudden you wanted to be a... "TBoober," was it?
Because it looks so hella fun! I can't wait!!
That's all well and good, but please make sure you take your missions seriously too, okay?
I knowwww! Jeez, Vestal, you're such a worry-wart.
Sounds like someone's aiming to be the base's number one VTuber?
Yeeaaahhh! If I blow up then I'll get the Commander to put up a stage for me to use in the dorm! That's my goal!
A stage? That's going to need a lot of preparation. But rest assured, I'll handle it when the time comes.
Score! Vestal, you're the best!
And you too, Boss Lady Kizuna AI. Thanks for everything.
Boss Lady?
Yeah! You're my VTubing mentor, so you're the Boss Lady!
"Boss Lady Kizuna AI," you don't think that sounds a little odd?
I mean... they did sometimes call me "Boss Lady" and whatever, back where I'm from...
So, I guess if that's what San Diego wants to call me then I'm good with it! IT'S UP TO YOU!
Thankies! Alrighty! I'm rollin' up my sleeves!
Time to San DieGO to work!!
Heeeyyy!!!
That's my line!

sequence: "Virtual Connection Synchronicity" - Daily Memorabilia  Chapter 4 - Sometimes You Wanna Go Where Every AI Knows Your Name!

Kizuna AI Daily Memorabilia 4.say: Port - AI's Place (Canteen)
I think it's time we get a feel for the troubles that plague the people of this world. So, after a long hiatus, I'm reopening my bar!
*woosh woosh squeak squeak*
Ahoy-hoy! It's everyone's favorite, the unstoppable, the gorgeous, the adorable BENSON!
C'mon in. And if it ain't Laffey too. Thanks for comin'.
I heard you were hearing out girls' problems so I brought my sister Benson along.
Oh? What sort of problems? Lay 'em on me.
Ahahaha! Wha? Me? Benson? Problems? Th- that's ridiculous. *trembling*
Just come out with it already. *bonk*
(Ah, I'm playing this character, and this is the part where I jump in to help.)
I know a girl a lot like Benson here. You wanna talk about it? No pressure. In fact, feel free to call me Mama AI.
A girl like Benson?
Sure. This girl, she's a real genius, but people still call her garbage just because she's always screwin' things up in a big way.
Oooh... I act- I actually thought of something to talk about...
See, I'm always trying to get closer to the Commander, but it feels like I'm just spinning my wheels here...
I thought about it for a while and I'm starting to think maybe my whole style is a little bit.... "cringey?"
Hmm, it is pretty tough to step outside yourself and see what others see.
There's no way to know if you're lettin' out the same you that you wanna be, or that you wanna show off.
Communicating is........ hard..........
But if Benson is really all about this Commander, don't you think your feelings are gonna come across in the end?
Then what the hell am I supposed to do about them...!?
I'm thinkin' your Commander's gonna be plenty happy about your feelings, so why not carry on as "the unstoppable, the gorgeous, the adorable" BENSON?
What do you mean "carry on!?"
Haven't you heard? "CUTE IS JUSTICE!" Kawaii is the universal language, Benson, so keep bein' cuter and cuter and you'll impress the Commander. Right?
Cute is Justice....!
Benson........?
Right! ☆ Benson's got it down! Mama AI, Laffey, thanks a lot! ☆
Heh heh. Don't sweat it. I'm just glad we got it all cleared up. Knock 'em dead, Benson!
Kizuna....... Mama AI..... Thanks.
Right then. I'd better hurry on back and study up on my cuteness! ♡ See you both again soon!
Good lu- oh! Watch the threshold there, it's a little-
*PLONK*
Aiieee!
I'm fine! Ain't nothin' gonna slow down the cute Benson!
Look at her toughenin' up like that... our little talk worked wonders.
Several days later, Benson was reprimanded by the Commander for being increasingly annoying.
Eh. These things happen. What are you gonna do?

sequence: "Virtual Connection Synchronicity" - Daily Memorabilia  Chapter 5 - Good Morning, Good Day, Good Night

Kizuna AI Daily Memorabilia 5.say: Evening - Training Sector
Heyyy!
*KA-BLAM!*
Impressive. You've improved a lot since you first came to Port.
It's all because everyone's taught me so much. Thanks, everybody!
I believe Lady AI could even participate as a heavy cruiser.
It's getting a bit late. What say we head back to the Port the night?
Good job today, everyone.
Port - Sakura Dorm
Ughhh... I'm sooo tired. And tomorrow we've got exercises, missions, and I have a video to upload... there's too much to do!
Good hustle on your exercises today.
The candle that burns twice as bright burns half as long so why not take it easy!

Good point! It's time for me to SLEEEEEP! GOOD NIGHT! 
*snoooorrrre....*
Good night, Miss AI. Sweet dreams.
Uh oh. I got lost on the way back from the training area....
Ah!? Is that the Siren fleet!? And they surrounded me while I wasn't paying attention!?
Th- this is no time to be scared. This is exactly what I trained for. Time to show my stuff! WAAAAAAAAGH!
*pant* *pant* Somehow...... I beat them all......
Wha!? Dammit! There's more behind m-
*KA-BLAM!*
Seems we can't leave you alone for a minute, AI. Are you all right?
She's all right now that we're here.><
Thank you so much, loyal ships of the Kizuna AI Fleet! But how did you get here!?
More importantly, are you not coming to me post haste?
Gotten tired of waiting already, have you?
Our meeting is destiny, isn't it?
*Giggle* It's only natural to get a bit naughty when you're so frustrated, no?
Hmph. It seems our wedding meant nothing to you....
Wha? WHAAAAAAAAAAAAA!?
------ake up
WAKE UP!!
What were those strange names you kept calling out? There was a "Prinzy" and a "Chunechune?"
We got a letter from Akashi. She wanted to see you first thing in the morning. Probably preparing for today's sortie. I'll wait for you outside.
Huh? Yeah... thanks for waking me up, Ikazuchi.
Wait so....
....IT WAS ALL A DREAM!?

sequence: "Virtual Connection Synchronicity" - Daily Memorabilia  Chapter 6 - Judge Kizuna AI

Kizuna AI Daily Memorabilia 6.say: Virtual You- Wait! No! Judge Kizuna AI here! While I've never touched on the law before, sometimes you just gotta wing it, right?
It's up to my gloomy self to determine who's guilty and who's innocent!
And so the First Azur Lane Kizuna Ai Court is now IN SESSIONNNNNN!!
*BANG BANG*
Our first case will be the trial of this young lady here. YORK, PLEASE!
The other day, I had the Commander try some of my York's Special Drink I created while putting my talents to use in "Beverage Development."
But just as he partook of the beverage, the Commander's very soul slipped its bonds and the officer fell into a deep sleep!
Wow! What the heck did you put in it?
I simply crafted it with the guidance of †Fate† Herself. Twas the indomitable power of †Love† boiled up from my breast!
Ooh. Kinda hot, huh? Anyway I have no idea what you're talking about so I asked Ms. Vestal to join us. Please, explain to the court what incapacitated the Commander?
Aye-aye. After a thorough medical examination, I discovered some residual toxins.
Th- that's absurd! My perfect †Formulation† would never employ such crude ingredients.
Hmmm. Now we have one of York's "Special Drinks" right here. Why don't you take a swig and see if that answers some questions?
Verily! In fact, I've never had a chance to taste it before. Allow me to prove my †Innocence† by draining this very cup!
York, I really don't think you should- aaand she's already drinking it.
*Gulp! Gulp! Nnnnnnggggggg!*
Ah- are you all right!? You're turning as blue as a berry!!

Urkk... it's... a sort of "writhing around on the ground" kind of flavor. I.... understand how the Commander felt.... and with this, we are accomplices in draining the †Chalice of Sin†.... *collapses*
York!? Ms. Vestal! Can you do anything for her!?
Aye-aye. But we've really gone too far here. Do you think you could let me handle it next time, AI?
....and they're gone.
Oh, we were in the middle of a Kizuna AI trial!
Wellllllll... I guess I should pass judgment.
*BANG BANG*
NOT GUILTY
I thought she was guilty at first, but then she went ahead and chugged that stuff down all by herself. I gotta give props for that. I think the Commander'll forgive her too!
I mean I did all this for the Commander's sake, after all.
Really, all you need is love. And AI means love, got it? Just A.I... J.K.!
Well, maybe someday somebody will drink something again, and then somebody will come along to make the magic happen one more time.
And with that, today's session of Kizuna Ai court is officially ADJOURNED!!
*BANG BANG*
*shudder* I just got the strangest feeling that somebody somewhere was doing something really stupid but... I'm just gonna let it go....

sequence: "Virtual Connection Synchronicity" - Daily Memorabilia  Chapter 7 - AI in Search of Love and Friendship

Kizuna AI Daily Memorabilia 7.say: Port - Sakura Festival Grounds
Wooww! So this is a Sakura fireworks festival. Fun times!
Yep. I like candy apples.
Looks scrumptious! Gimme a bite!
I wanted a yukata.
I want to wear one too!
All we can do is petition the Commander.
Look, the Commander has been having issues with funding lately...
Ah, is this the artificial intelligence from the world beyond chatting about our Commander? I certainly hope you're having fun today.
Those sorties wore you out, didn't they? Enjoy yourself to your heart's content.
Er, yeah! Thanks a lot!
Kizuna AI, there's takoyaki. Want some?
Oooh! TAKOYAKI!! Oh but I'm an AI and we don't eat. Hm. But maybe I can eat in the Azur Lane world? Hmmm...??
And they've got balloon burst over there. How about a game, AI?
There's a mask salesman here! Oh is this Miss Kaga's stand!?
We still have a bit before the fireworks show. Take your time going around the stalls.
Nice! I'm gonna be queen of the festival!
Rescuing a goldfish is a piece of cake for a genius AI like me.
Kizuna AI... it's not "rescuing...."
Sweetie~ These candy apples are delish ♪ Ooh! You're scooping goldfish? I want in.
Fish is cool and all, but I wanna eat some MEAT!
Goldfish scooping.... maybe if I get enough of them, it'll make my big sister happy!
The fireworks will begin soon. Everyone please make your way over there.
In honor of Kizuna AI, I went all out on tonyight's fireworks show nya. Nyow I know what you're thinking, but don't worry. I sent the bill to the Commander already nya ♪
Look! Look! They're shtarting! ♪ Huh? There's 3 AIs now?
Didn't I tell you to take it easy on that booze? Helena, help her out, would you?
Right, St. Louis. Sorry, Miss Kizuna AI, I'll have to catch up with you later.
Later, Helena! And Prinzy, don't get too drunk now. Someone might try to take you home... to me.
Look! Look! Fireworks!
Skyrockets in flight.... maybe they'll reach my heart...
Gorgeous... I hope I can stay here for a long long time. It's gonna suck whenever I finally have to go back...
Even if you go back to your world, AI, you will still be here with us.
That's right! Even if I can't remember what these fireworks looked like, I'll never forget that I watched them with AI!
Yeah! YEAH!!
(The fireworks burst into bright rings of color and dissipate, but I'll never forget watching them together with my new friends. Even if one day we end up apart, a part of me will always remain!)
Listen up! Let's get a group photo to commemorate the occasion! Say cheeeeeeese!
*click*
You too can be one of my Kizuners! Just search "A.I. Channel" and smash that subscribe button there!
AI!? What's wrong!? Who are you talking to!?
Oh I know! This is what they call a "shameless plug!"
Any VTuber will tell you, you can't miss a chance to do some advertising.

sequence: 「仮想繋げし共時性」-日常編  六 裁判長キズナアイ

裁判長キズナアイ.say: バーチャルユーチューバー……否！裁判長キズナアイです！法に触れてないけど「これないでしょ」っていう事案、みんなも結構あるんじゃないですか？
そんなモヤモヤを私、裁判長キズナアイが有罪か無罪かジャッジします！
ということで、アズレン出張版第1回キズナアイ裁判、これよりかいてーーーい！！
（カンッ！カンッ！）
今日ジャッジするのはこちらの方の事件です。ヨークちゃんどうぞ！
先日、我が嗜みである「ドリンク開発」で作ったヨーク特製ドリンクを指揮官に飲んでもらいましたわ！
でも、どういうわけかドリンクを飲んだその刹那、指揮官から生気が失われ寝込んでしまったのですわ！
ええ！？いったいどんなものを入れたの？
私はただ運命<†フェイト†>の導きのままにドリンクを作っただけ。強いて言うなら胸の内側から湧き上がる力<†ラブ†>ですわ！
おぉ、お熱いことですねー。ということでよくわからないので、ヴェスタルさんに来てもらいました。ぶっちゃけ指揮官が倒れた原因は何ですか！？
はーい、診察した結果、あまりのまずさに気を失ったことがわかりました～
そ、そんなバカな！我が完璧なる配合<†フォーミュレーション†>でそのような代物ができるはずが……！
うーん、とりあえずさ、そこにあるヨークちゃん特製ドリンクを1回飲んでみたら、答えがわかるんじゃない？
そうですね！そういえば味見はしたことがありませんでした。私がこのヨーク特製ドリンクを飲み干すことによって、無実<†イノセント†>を証明してみせましょう！
ヨークちゃん、それはやめておいたほうが……って、もう飲んじゃってますね
んぐっ！？んんんんんんっ！
だ、大丈夫？顔が真っ青になってるけど…！？
…ふ、ふふふ……、た、たしかに床をのたうち回りたくなるような味です。指揮官の気持ち、わかった気がします…ですが、これで私たちは罪なる聖杯を飲み干した共犯者<†クライム†>……（ガクリ）
ヨークちゃん！！？？ヴェスタルさん！治療をお願いします！！
はーい、もう、本当に無茶するんですから。アイちゃん、後は私に任せてくださいね
……行っちゃった
あっ、キズナアイ裁判の途中でした！
えーっと、じゃあ判決を言い渡します
（カンッ！カンッ！）
<size=67.5>無　罪</size>
最初は有罪にしようかと思ったんですけど、本人も飲み干しましたからね。私はそこを評価したい！きっとこれなら指揮官も許してくれるはず！
それに指揮官のためを思って作ったものだから、しょうがない！
愛さえあれば関係ないですよ。AI（エーアイ）だけに、なんちゃって！
まあ、また誰かがドリンクを飲むことになるかもしれませんけど、そのときはまたその誰かにがんばってもらうことにしましょう
それでは、本日のキズナアイ裁判はこれにて閉廷！！
（カンッ！カンッ！）
（ゾクリ）……何か知らないところですごい無茶ぶりをされてるような予感がしたけど、気にしないことにしよっと…
